CommandLine Start Time: 06:38:08.098
Skipping Extension Load - No Project / Extension Path Found

Executing Ahsoka.CommandLine (5.14.1-zzz-develop.8) from...
    /tmp/inspectra-help-ahsoka-a3ab504d-510d11ad/tool/Ahsoka.CommandLine
With Arguments...
    --help 


Usage: Ahsoka.CommandLine --COMMAND [<ARGS>]

Available in InstallerCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --StartInstallService: Start the Installer and System Services

Available in PrepCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --ReturnToInstaller: Shutdown Current Application and Return to Installer UI
                                                 [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)

     --FactoryPrep: Stores Factory Information in the Cloud (PN/SN/MAC)
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON)
            [ManufacturingInfoFile] - Manufacturing Info File (JSON) 

     --Prep: Stores Factory Information in the Cloud (PN/SN/MAC)
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON)

Available in ClientGeneratorCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --GenerateClients: Generate Clients for a Non-DotNet Language
            [PathToPackageInfo] File containing Package Info
            [PathToOutputFolder] Folder where Class Definitions will be created

Available in DisplayProvisioningCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --ProvisionDisplay: License the Display For the Specified Modules
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON)
            [ProvisioningFile] - Provisioning File with OTA and License Info (JSON).

     --ProvisionDisplay: Setup Displays to acquire licenses on first Spark connection
            [DeviceInfoFile] - Device Info File (csv)
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON)
            [ProvisioningFile] - Provisioning File with OTA and License Info (JSON).

     --GetHardwareModel: Get Model information to identify the hardware

     --GetHardwareSerialNumber: Get UniqueId used to identify the hardware

Available in PackageCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --LoadApplication: Loads and Installs an .opv File
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File(JSON)
            [ApplicationFile] Path to an opv file

     --Package: Package as an opv file.  Will use info from 'PackageInfo.json
            [WorkingDirectory] Optional - Base Path to use when Executing Packaging
            [PathToInstallFile] Optional - Specify an alternative 'PackageInfo.json

     --PackageCustom: Package as an opv file.  Will use info from 'PackageInfo.json
            [WorkingDirectory] - Base Path to use when Executing Packaging
            [PathToInstallFile] - Specify an alternative 'PackageInfo.json'
            [CustomPackagePath] - Path to Customer 'CustomInfo.json'

     --PrintManifest: Print Contents of opv package file
            [PathToPackageFile] Optional = File to print manifest for
            [PathToKeyFile] Optional = Private Key File used to Sign / Encrypt this Package

     --Verify: Verify that Factory Folder is Complete and Valid

Available in ProjectCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --AddExtensions: Install Extensions to the specified project.
            [PathToPackageInfoFile] Required - Specify the 'PackageInfo.json'
            [SupportVersion] Required - Major Release to Pull (such as 4.0)'
            [IncludePreRelease] Required - True or False'
            [PrivateExtensionFeed] Required - PAT@URL of Feed or None'

     --AddSdkFromLocal: Install SDK Files to the specified project from a Local Source
            [PathToPackageInfoFile] Required - Specify the 'PackageInfo.json'
            [PlatformSupportFolder] Required - Path to Local Support Folder)

     --AddSdkFromSpark: Install SDK Files to the specified project using Spark as the Install Source
            [PathToPackageInfoFile] Required - Specify the 'PackageInfo.json'
            [SpecificVersion] Required - Version to Download / Install
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Required Spark Connection Info File (JSON).

     --RunSdkCommands: Run Model and Generator Commands for the specified project
            [PathToPackageInfoFile] Required - Specify the 'PackageInfo.json'

Available in ProtoGeneratorCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --GenerateProto: Generate Proto File for a Non-DotNet Language
            [ServiceName] 
            [OutputFileName] Folder where Class Definitions will be created

Available in ServiceCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --StartServices: Start Services for the Passed in Configuration
            [ConfigurationFile] Path to a Configuration.json or .pbuff file

Available in SparkCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --CreateSparkCredentialFile: Create a Credential File for use in Spark Uploads / Downloads
            [Url] Required - URL for Spark Endpoint
            [Login] Required - Login Name for Spark 
            [Password] - Required - Password for Spark
            [PathToOuputFile] - Required - Path to Save Credential File

     --CreateSparkManifest: 
            [WorkingDirectory] Folder To Process - Will Create a ReleaseName.release.json file
            [ReleaseName] Name of Release
            [Version] Optional Version of Release

     --CreateSparkSubscription:Subscribe the Display to the Spark Application
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON)
            [SparkSubscriptionRequest] - Spark Subscription Info File (JSON).

     --UploadToSpark: 
            [WorkingDirectory] Uploads Application Package to Spark - Should include 1 or more *.release.json files
            [Url] Spark URL to Upload To.
            [Login] Spark Login.
            [Password] Spark Password.
            [Version] Override the Version in Release Files with this version.

     --UploadToSparkWithInfo: 
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON).
            [WorkingDirectory] Uploads Application Package to Spark - Should include 1 or more *.release.json files.
            [Version] Override the Version in Release Files with this version.

     --DownloadFromSpark: 
            [SparkConnectionInfoFile] - Spark Connection Info File (JSON).
            [DownloadFolder] Folder to place downloads. All Files in the Manifest will be downloaded to the folder.
            [ChannelName] Release Name to Download.
            [ChannelVersion] Version to Download.
            [FileName] File to Download (leave empty to download all items).

Available in TestCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --Test: Run Test Script
            [WiFi] Test WiFi Directly
            [WiFiService] Test WiFi Via Ahsoka Services
            [WiFiServiceAP] Test WiFi AccessPoint Via Ahsoka Services
            [SystemService] Test System Services
            [DeviceService] Test Device Services
            [MonitorIgnitionNotification] Test Ignition Pin Notifications
            [IOService] Test IO on the Display.

Available in SecurityCommands (Ahsoka.Core)

     --LockDisplay: Locks a Display with the Specified SSH Key 
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)
            [Description] -  Name of the Key file to use when locking the display - Used if Target does not contain an Existing PrivateKeyFile

     --LockAppInstaller: Locks a Application INstaller with a Private Signing Key
            [TargetConnectionInfoFile] - Connection Info File (JSON)
            [PrivateKeyFile] -  Path to Private Key for Verifying Applications
